title: xyris wawrae
intro: Xyris wawrae is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae, commonly known as the yellow-eyed grass. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Xyris wawrae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of Xyris wawrae are often infused in hot water or used in combination with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and salves.
